shortDescription.default: Review Microsoft 365 Copilot readiness risks and create governed remediation actions.

longDescription.default: A SharePoint Copilot App for reviewing readiness assessments, investigating risks, selecting affected resources, assigning owners and creating remediation actions in SharePoint.

features.title: Copilot Readiness Action Centre Feature
features.description: Activates the Copilot Readiness Action Centre agent and UX component.
